title: ADR-0004 Citation-Format Validator — approve & decide blocking policy
description: ADR-0004 proposes a citation-format validator as a pre-lookup stage in the existing citations gate (src/lib/citations/). Scoped at 26 story points across 8 tasks. One business decision is open: should a format_invalid result HARD-BLOCK the draft (like verification_failed) or WARN-and-flag in the audit drawer for attorney judgment? Architect recommendation: hard-block malformed/missing-components (credibility-killers), warn-only on stylistic format-drift vs CourtListener's normalized form.

title: Code Review verdict: REQUEST_CHANGES — 2 blocking findings on citation gate
description: Baseline+design review of the ai-paralegal citation gate against ADR-0004. Verdict REQUEST_CHANGES. The proposed validateCitationFormat() feature is not yet implemented (only the ADR doc is committed). Two blocking findings need decisions, plus the architect's open hard-block-vs-warn policy question.

title: Security Scan — 7 findings to triage (2 High, 3 Medium, 2 Low)
description: First security scan of ai-paralegal. All three scan phases completed. Triage each finding for prioritization/remediation. The auth finding (H-1) is the most urgent deploy-time risk.

title: Approve publish of release v0.2.0 (push tag + GitHub release)
description: v0.2.0 has been bumped, changelogged, committed (77d069e), and tagged locally. The outward-facing publish steps were NOT performed automatically. Decide whether to push the commit + tag to origin and publish the GitHub release. Note: open security findings (no-auth dev tenant, CourtListener full-doc egress, postcss XSS) are unresolved on this tree — confirm whether v0.2.0 should ship before they are addressed.
